micro_plan: Lane E (agent-commerce): (1) Audit affiliate-link-wrapper edge function — GET/POST, affiliate_clicks insert, kill-switch, CORS; (2) Make FTC badges DB-driven: is_affiliated | affiliate_url for visibility, affiliate_disclosure for tooltip/copy; AffiliateBadge disclosureText prop; ShopProduct/Shop/IntelligenceCommerce/ProductDetail use DB columns; (3) Run tsc, build, affiliate-link-checker, affiliate-link-tracker-auditor, stripe-integration-tester, hub-shell-detector; (4) Verify JSON + build_tracker update.

build.note: Pre-existing failure: vite-plugin-pwa / workbox writeSW (terser renderChunk). Not caused by COMMERCE-POWER-01 code changes.

affiliate-link-checker.evidence: affiliate-link-wrapper at supabase/functions/affiliate-link-wrapper; GET/POST; logs to affiliate_clicks; enforceEdgeFunctionEnabled; CORS. FTC badges: AffiliateBadge, ProductDetail, ShopProduct, Shop, IntelligenceCommerce, ProductCard, AffiliateLinks, AffiliateDashboard. Distributor: affiliate_links.distributor_id, wrapper accepts distributor_id.

affiliate-link-tracker-auditor.evidence: Schema: affiliate_clicks (target_url, product_id, affiliate_code, distributor_id, user_id, ip_address, user_agent). Wrapper: affiliate-link-wrapper inserts then 302/200. FTC disclosure: Commission-linked badge + optional affiliate_disclosure (DB) on ProductDetail, ShopProduct; hasAffiliate from is_affiliated | affiliate_url on Shop, IntelligenceCommerce.

stripe-integration-tester.evidence: Stripe edge functions present: stripe-webhook, subscription-webhook, shop-webhook, create-checkout, manage-subscription. Commerce lane does not modify Stripe; audit confirms no regression.

hub-shell-detector.evidence: node scripts/shell-detector.mjs: 0 shells (0.0% of scored pages), 187 LIVE, 60 DEMO, 35 EXEMPT. Gate passed. No new shells introduced.

block_reason: Build exit_code 1 (vite-plugin-pwa / workbox service worker write). tsc=0; all four skills PASS. COMMERCE-POWER-01 code complete: affiliate-link-wrapper audited; FTC badges DB-driven (is_affiliated, affiliate_url, affiliate_disclosure).
